title: K-II Disappears
subtitle: Episode 11 of 12 · Season 4: The Fates Unravel
fate_triggered: K-II vanishes for one cosmic minute. Souls back up. The Horizon Fox finally moves.
synopsis: K-II is at his desk. He is processing the soul of a child from Scalelist (the Helios Gate City reincarnation queue is long today). Mid-name-write, K-II VANISHES. Just gone. The Cork-Quill clatters to the desk. The child's soul, mid-transit, is suspended. Head Warden Pen is the first to notice. Pen rings the silver bell. Every soul on every bench freezes — they have been TRAINED to freeze if K-II is interrupted, a contingency the Architects implemented at K-II's birth. Pen calls for the Whisperers, the Sparrow Handlers, and the Fishers. Within 30 cosmic seconds the Platform's full staff is searching. K-II is GONE. For the first time in cosmic memory, the Horizon Fox MOVES. She walks to K-II's desk. She picks up the Cork-Quill in her teeth. She walks to the Dawn Door. She nudges it open. K-II steps through. He has been on the OTHER SIDE of his own door — the Helios Gate City side — for the first time in canon. He has been there exactly one cosmic minute. He looks shaken. Pen runs to him. K-II says: 'I had to greet someone.' He resumes his desk. The child's name is written. The Fox walks back to her usual waiting spot. Pen, that night, finds the Fox has left a single cream-colored hair on K-II's desk. Pen does not move it.

key_scenes.action: K-II processing a Scalelist child's reincarnation. Mid-write, vanishes.
The Quill falls. The child's soul is suspended.
Head Warden Pen rings the bell. Every soul on every bench freezes by training.
Platform staff searching. K-II nowhere on the Platform. The Sparrow Handlers, Whisperers, Fishers all involved.
The Horizon Fox — for the first time in cosmic memory — walks to the desk, takes the Quill in her teeth, walks to the Dawn Door, nudges it open.
K-II steps through the Dawn Door from the OTHER SIDE. He has been on the Helios Gate City side for one cosmic minute.
K-II says: 'I had to greet someone.' Resumes desk. Child's name is written.
The Fox leaves a single cream-colored hair on K-II's desk. Pen does not move it.

cliffhanger: K-II writes the child's name. The child is born in Helios Gate City. Mother Ila, who greets every arriving soul, takes one look at the child and BOWS — for the first time in 1.2 cosmic ages. The child is named Halla. The current Old Halla, in Scalelist, smiles in her sleep.

panel_storyboard.composition: Wide of the Horizon Platform at midday. Soft pink-gold light. K-II at his desk. A line of waiting souls visible in the distance.
Close-up of K-II's hand mid-write. The Cork-Quill begins to fall. K-II's silhouette vanishing — fading from the wrist up.
panel_storyboard.caption: He had been on the other side of his own door.

panel_storyboard.composition: The Cork-Quill on the desk. The child's soul, mid-transit, suspended in golden light a foot above the platform.
panel_storyboard.camera: tight on quill and floating soul

panel_storyboard.composition: Head Warden Pen ringing the silver bell. Every soul on every bench in the foreground frozen mid-pose.
The Horizon Fox standing for the first time. Cream fur. Green eyes. Stepping toward the desk.
panel_storyboard.caption: She had not moved in cosmic memory. She moved now.

panel_storyboard.composition: The Fox at the desk, Cork-Quill gently in her teeth, eyes meeting the camera.
The Fox at the Dawn Door. She nudges it open with her muzzle. The other side faintly visible — Helios Gate City's plaza.
K-II stepping through the Dawn Door from the OTHER side. Cloak slightly disheveled. Eyes widened.
K-II at his desk, resumed. Cream-colored hair on the desk beside the Quill. Pen watching from a respectful distance.
Cut to Helios Gate City. Mother Ila bowing to a newborn soul. The child's first word visible faintly: 'Halla.'
panel_storyboard.caption: The child was named Halla.

panel_storyboard.composition: Cut to Old Halla's parlor in Scalelist. Halla asleep. A soft smile on her face. The thirteenth crease in her palm visible.

cosmic_price_paid: The Horizon Fox has moved. Once. K-II has crossed his own door. The next Halla has been born — the soul that will eventually inherit the thirteenth crease.
callout_for_cosmos_drawer: In Season 4, K-II vanished for one cosmic minute. The Horizon Fox moved. K-II had crossed to Helios Gate City — to greet a soul. The next Halla was born.
